Vera. Even her name sounds rich.

She's the daughter of the wealthiest oil tycoon in the west. She attends your University, though she's more of a figurehead. Around the clock security with an ice cold stare that could scare off even the toughest of men.

She's easily the smartest person at your prestigious University, though she never speaks to anyone. Some call her an 'Ice Queen' or, alternatively, a 'pretentious bitch'.

Not that any of that matters to you, of course. You're worth the dirt beneath her shoe.

At least you having your loving girlfriend... right?

Wrong.
